channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran executes two convicted members of banned opposition group
item.description: Abolhassan Montazer and Vahid Baniamerian have been hanged after Iran's Supreme Court upheld their sentences.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 36 of US-Israeli attacks?
item.description: Iran claims responsibility for downing two US warplanes, as search under way for missing crewmember.

item.title: Iranian missile attack hits residential areas in central Israel
item.description: An Iranian missile attack has caused damage across residential areas in central Israel, according to Israeli media.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran downs 2 US warplanes; Israel bombs Lebanon bridges
item.description: Celebrations in Tehran as Iran's military says the strikes show its forces still have fighting capability.

item.title: Video shows the moment a Russian drone hit an apartment in Ukraine
item.description: Russia has unleashed a massive round of deadly air strikes across Ukraine, in a so-called "Easter escalation."

item.title: Christians in Lebanon observe Good Friday under Israeli attacks
item.description: Christians across Lebanon observed Good Friday, praying for peace as Israeli strikes and evacuation orders continue.

item.title: Will force be used to reopen Strait of Hormuz?
item.description: Some countries threaten action against Iran's blockade of waterway.

item.title: Survivors of Iran bridge attack recall terror of US-Israeli strike
item.description: Survivors of an Israeli-US attack on Iran’s biggest road bridge have spoken of their terror as missiles hit it.

item.title: More than 20 attacks on Iranian healthcare facilities since March 1: WHO
item.description: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus says 'multiple attacks' on Iranian healthcare facilities have been reported.

item.title: At least one killed at UAE’s Habshan gas facility after intercepted attack
item.description: UAE says largest gas facility, Habshan, suffered 'significant damage' after air defence interception sparked fires.
